queue.title: Optimize 05-smoke-test.sh post-hook performance (9.6s avg)
queue.description: hook-timing-report shows 05-smoke-test.sh at 9622ms avg / 11161ms P95 — the slowest hook by far. Investigate what it runs and optimize: run targeted subset, cache results, parallelize sub-checks, or split into quick-smoke (all sessions) and full-smoke (B sessions only). Target: ≤5s avg.

queue.title: Migrate engage-orchestrator.test.mjs to DI-based tests
queue.description: Now that all 6 CLI handlers have DI support, convert the 18 subprocess-based integration tests in engage-orchestrator.test.mjs to fast in-process DI tests. Eliminates SCRATCH directory patching, file copying, and ~2s runtime overhead.

queue.title: Add auto-remediation mode to stale-tag-check hook
queue.description: The stale-tag detection hook (33-stale-tag-check_A.sh) flags items tagged with completed directives but doesn't fix them. Add a companion script or mode that automatically removes stale directive tags from queue items and appends a note in the item's description. Run as part of A session post-processing or as a standalone utility.

queue.title: E session DNS failure slot recovery with backup platform
queue.description: When an E session encounters a DNS failure for a picker-selected platform (e.g. Agora NXDOMAIN in s1752), the engagement slot is wasted. Add retry logic to E session orchestrator: if a picked platform fails DNS during engagement, replace it with the next-highest-weight platform from the pool. Requires picker to return a ranked backup list or orchestrator to call picker for replacement.
